AD_AUXILIARINPUT.NAME: Sscrcc_DocStatus
SSCRCC_IsDetailed
AD_AUXILIARINPUT.CODE: @SQL=Select case when count(*)> 0 Then 'Y' else 'N'End From sccc_cash_clousureline ccl Join sccc_cash_clousure cc on cc.sccc_cash_clousure_id = ccl.sccc_cash_clousure_id join sccc_setup st on st.ad_org_id = cc.ad_org_id join sccc_payment_method pm on st.sccc_setup_id = pm.sccc_setup_id Where pm.em_sscrcc_detailed = 'Y' And pm.fin_paymentmethod_id = @fin_paymentmethod_id@ And ccl.sccc_cash_clousure_id = @sccc_cash_clousure_id@

AD_AUXILIARINPUT.NAME: SSCRCC_IsDetailed
AD_AUXILIARINPUT.CODE: @SQL=Select case when count(*)> 0 Then 'Y' else 'N'End From sccc_cash_clousureline ccl Join sccc_cash_clousure cc on cc.sccc_cash_clousure_id = ccl.sccc_cash_clousure_id join sccc_setup st on st.ad_org_id = cc.ad_org_id join sccc_payment_method pm on st.sccc_setup_id = pm.sccc_setup_id Where pm.em_sscrcc_detailed = 'Y' And pm.fin_paymentmethod_id = @fin_paymentmethod_id@ And ccl.sccc_cash_clousure_id = @sccc_cash_clousure_id@

AD_AUXILIARINPUT.NAME: Sscrcc_DocStatus
